Here is a product description for a water bottle:

Stay hydrated on-the-go with our durable and BPA-free water bottle, designed to keep your drinks cold for hours. Made from high-quality, shatter-resistant Tritan material, this bottle is perfect for daily use and can withstand even the most enthusiastic water enthusiasts. With its leak-proof lid and spill-proof design, you can enjoy your favorite drinks without worrying about spills or messes.
